creator: lioux@gns.com.br
text:
This is an update to the bulk_mailer port to version 1.9

Fix: 

There have been some changes. I stritcly followed the source file patches provided by the actual port. However, due to a newly included configure scriptin the distribution, many changes that were made to the Makefile by patches are not needed anymore. Besides that, I moved some of the 'patches' work to the ports Makefile.
	The update port is in the ftp.freebsd.org:/pub/FreeBSD/incoming
	MD5 (bulk_mailer-1.9.tar.gz) = 815e7da5e208eab9bf27024764a35f98
